description: Create a content slide on humans and machines with a sidebar navigation and a large hype cycle scatter chart plus a right-hand text callout panel.

header.headline: Workplaces have experienced a push to digitalization due to the pandemic – Other innovations are yet to impact our working life
header.sub: Gartner Hype Cycle for the Digital Workplace in 2020

main.title: Gartner Hype Cycle for the Digital Workplace in 2020
quadrant_labels: Slope of Enlightenment / Plateau of Productivity

right.body: Callout panel with multiple paragraphs highlighting implications of the Gartner hype cycle for the digital workplace and the uneven impact of innovations on working life.
